1205→                return true
1206→            }
1207→            ViewerCommand.ADD_NOTE -> {
1208→                addNote(fromGesture)
1209→                return true
1210→            }
1211→            ViewerCommand.CARD_INFO -> {
1212→                openCardInfo(fromGesture)
1213→                return true
1214→            }
1215→            ViewerCommand.RESCHEDULE_NOTE -> {
1216→                showRescheduleCardDialog()
1217→                return true
1218→            }
1219→            else -> return super.executeCommand(which, fromGesture)
1220→        }
1221→    }
1222→
1223→    private fun toggleFlag(flag: Flag) {
1224→        if (currentCard!!.userFlag() == flag.code) {
1225→            Timber.i("Toggle flag: unsetting flag")
1226→            onFlag(currentCard, Flag.NONE)
1227→        } else {
1228→            Timber.i("Toggle flag: Setting flag to %d", flag.code)
1229→            onFlag(currentCard, flag)
1230→        }
1231→    }
1232→
1233→    override fun restoreCollectionPreferences(col: Collection) {
1234→        super.restoreCollectionPreferences(col)
1235→        showRemainingCardCount = col.config.get("dueCounts") ?: true
1236→        stopTimerOnAnswer = col.decks.confForDid(col.decks.current().id).getBoolean("stopTimerOnAnswer")
1237→    }
1238→
1239→    override fun onSingleTap(): Boolean {
1240→        if (prefFullscreenReview && isImmersiveSystemUiVisible(this)) {
1241→            delayedHide(INITIAL_HIDE_DELAY)
1242→            return true
1243→        }
1244→        return false
1245→    }
1246→
1247→    override fun onFling() {
1248→        if (prefFullscreenReview && isImmersiveSystemUiVisible(this)) {
1249→            delayedHide(INITIAL_HIDE_DELAY)
1250→        }
1251→    }
1252→
1253→    override fun onCardEdited(card: Card) {
1254→        super.onCardEdited(card)
1255→        if (prefWhiteboard && whiteboard != null) {
1256→            whiteboard!!.clear()
1257→        }
1258→        if (!isDisplayingAnswer) {
1259→            // Editing the card may reuse mCurrentCard. If so, the scheduler won't call startTimer() to reset the timer
1260→            // QUESTIONABLE(legacy code): Only perform this if editing the question
1261→            card.startTimer()
1262→        }
1263→    }
1264→
1265→    private val fullScreenHandler: Handler = object : Handler(getDefaultLooper()) {
1266→        override fun handleMessage(msg: Message) {
1267→            if (prefFullscreenReview) {
1268→                setFullScreen(this@Reviewer)
1269→            }
1270→        }
1271→    }
1272→
1273→    /** Hide the navigation if in full-screen mode after a given period of time  */
1274→    protected open fun delayedHide(delayMillis: Int) {
1275→        Timber.d("Fullscreen delayed hide in %dms", delayMillis)
1276→        fullScreenHandler.removeMessages(0)
1277→        fullScreenHandler.sendEmptyMessageDelayed(0, delayMillis.toLong())
1278→    }
1279→
1280→    private fun setWhiteboardEnabledState(state: Boolean) {
1281→        prefWhiteboard = state
1282→        MetaDB.storeWhiteboardState(this, parentDid, state)
1283→        if (state && whiteboard == null) {
1284→            createWhiteboard()
1285→        }
1286→    }
1287→
1288→    @Suppress("deprecation") // #9332: UI Visibility -> Insets
1289→    private fun setFullScreen(a: AbstractFlashcardViewer) {
1290→        // Set appropriate flags to enable Sticky Immersive mode.
1291→        a.window.decorView.systemUiVisibility = (
1292→            View.SYSTEM_UI_FLAG_LAYOUT_STABLE // | View.SYSTEM_UI_FLAG_LAYOUT_HIDE_NAVIGATION // temporarily disabled due to #5245
1293→                or View.SYSTEM_UI_FLAG_LAYOUT_FULLSCREEN
1294→                or View.SYSTEM_UI_FLAG_HIDE_NAVIGATION
1295→                or View.SYSTEM_UI_FLAG_FULLSCREEN
1296→                or View.SYSTEM_UI_FLAG_LOW_PROFILE
1297→                or View.SYSTEM_UI_FLAG_IMMERSIVE
1298→            )
1299→        // Show / hide the Action bar together with the status bar
1300→        val prefs = a.sharedPrefs()
1301→        val fullscreenMode = fromPreference(prefs)
1302→        a.window.statusBarColor = MaterialColors.getColor(a, R.attr.appBarColor, 0)
1303→        val decorView = a.window.decorView
1304→        decorView.setOnSystemUiVisibilityChangeListener { flags: Int ->
1305→            val toolbar = a.findViewById<View>(R.id.toolbar)
1306→            val answerButtons = a.findViewById<View>(R.id.answer_options_layout)
1307→            val topbar = a.findViewById<View>(R.id.top_bar)
1308→            if (toolbar == null || topbar == null || answerButtons == null) {
1309→                return@setOnSystemUiVisibilityChangeListener
1310→            }
1311→            // Note that system bars will only be "visible" if none of the
1312→            // LOW_PROFILE, HIDE_NAVIGATION, or FULLSCREEN flags are set.
1313→            val visible = flags and View.SYSTEM_UI_FLAG_HIDE_NAVIGATION == 0
1314→            Timber.d("System UI visibility change. Visible: %b", visible)
1315→            if (visible) {
1316→                showViewWithAnimation(toolbar)
1317→                if (fullscreenMode == FullScreenMode.FULLSCREEN_ALL_GONE) {
1318→                    showViewWithAnimation(topbar)
1319→                    showViewWithAnimation(answerButtons)
1320→                }
1321→            } else {
1322→                hideViewWithAnimation(toolbar)
1323→                if (fullscreenMode == FullScreenMode.FULLSCREEN_ALL_GONE) {
1324→                    hideViewWithAnimation(topbar)
1325→                    hideViewWithAnimation(answerButtons)
1326→                }
1327→            }
1328→        }
1329→    }
1330→
1331→    private fun showViewWithAnimation(view: View) {
1332→        view.alpha = 0.0f
1333→        view.visibility = View.VISIBLE
1334→        view.animate().alpha(TRANSPARENCY).setDuration(ANIMATION_DURATION.toLong()).setListener(null)
1335→    }
1336→
1337→    private fun hideViewWithAnimation(view: View) {
1338→        view.animate()
1339→            .alpha(0f)
1340→            .setDuration(ANIMATION_DURATION.toLong())
1341→            .setListener(object : AnimatorListenerAdapter() {
1342→                override fun onAnimationEnd(animation: Animator) {
1343→                    view.visibility = View.GONE
1344→                }
1345→            })
1346→    }
1347→
1348→    @Suppress("deprecation") // #9332: UI Visibility -> Insets
1349→    private fun isImmersiveSystemUiVisible(activity: AnkiActivity): Boolean {
1350→        return activity.window.decorView.systemUiVisibility and View.SYSTEM_UI_FLAG_HIDE_NAVIGATION == 0
1351→    }
1352→
1353→    override suspend fun handlePostRequest(uri: String, bytes: ByteArray): ByteArray {
1354→        return if (uri.startsWith(ANKI_PREFIX)) {
1355→            when (val methodName = uri.substring(ANKI_PREFIX.length)) {
1356→                "getSchedulingStatesWithContext" -> getSchedulingStatesWithContext()
1357→                "setSchedulingStates" -> setSchedulingStates(bytes)
1358→                else -> throw IllegalArgumentException("unhandled request: $methodName")
1359→            }
1360→        } else if (uri.startsWith(ANKIDROID_JS_PREFIX)) {
1361→            jsApi.handleJsApiRequest(
1362→                uri.substring(ANKIDROID_JS_PREFIX.length),
1363→                bytes,
1364→                returnDefaultValues = false
1365→            )
1366→        } else {
1367→            throw IllegalArgumentException("unhandled request: $uri")
1368→        }
1369→    }
1370→
1371→    private fun getSchedulingStatesWithContext(): ByteArray {
1372→        val state = queueState ?: return ByteArray(0)
1373→        return state.schedulingStatesWithContext().toBuilder()
1374→            .mergeStates(
1375→                state.states.toBuilder().mergeCurrent(
1376→                    state.states.current.toBuilder()
1377→                        .setCustomData(state.topCard.toBackendCard().customData).build()
1378→                ).build()
1379→            )
1380→            .build()
1381→            .toByteArray()
1382→    }
1383→
1384→    private fun setSchedulingStates(bytes: ByteArray): ByteArray {
1385→        val state = queueState
1386→        if (state == null) {
1387→            statesMutated = true
1388→            return ByteArray(0)
1389→        }
1390→        val req = SetSchedulingStatesRequest.parseFrom(bytes)
1391→        if (req.key == customSchedulingKey) {
1392→            state.states = req.states
1393→        }
1394→        statesMutated = true
1395→        return ByteArray(0)
1396→    }
1397→
1398→    private fun createWhiteboard() {
1399→        whiteboard = createInstance(this, true, this)
1400→
1401→        // We use the pen color of the selected deck at the time the whiteboard is enabled.
1402→        // This is how all other whiteboard settings are
1403→        val whiteboardPenColor = MetaDB.getWhiteboardPenColor(this, parentDid).fromPreferences()
1404→        if (whiteboardPenColor != null) {
1405→            whiteboard!!.penColor = whiteboardPenColor
1406→        }
1407→        whiteboard!!.setOnPaintColorChangeListener(object : OnPaintColorChangeListener {
1408→            override fun onPaintColorChange(color: Int?) {
1409→                MetaDB.storeWhiteboardPenColor(this@Reviewer, parentDid, !currentTheme.isNightMode, color)
1410→            }
1411→        })
1412→        whiteboard!!.setOnTouchListener { v: View, event: MotionEvent? ->
1413→            if (event == null) return@setOnTouchListener false
1414→            // If the whiteboard is currently drawing, and triggers the system UI to show, we want to continue drawing.
1415→            if (!whiteboard!!.isCurrentlyDrawing && (
1416→                !showWhiteboard || (
1417→                    prefFullscreenReview &&
1418→                        isImmersiveSystemUiVisible(this@Reviewer)
1419→                    )
1420→                )
1421→            ) {
1422→                // Bypass whiteboard listener when it's hidden or fullscreen immersive mode is temporarily suspended
1423→                v.performClick()
1424→                return@setOnTouchListener gestureDetector!!.onTouchEvent(event)
1425→            }
1426→            whiteboard!!.handleTouchEvent(event)
1427→        }
1428→    }
1429→
1430→    // Show or hide the whiteboard
1431→    private fun setWhiteboardVisibility(state: Boolean) {
1432→        showWhiteboard = state
1433→        MetaDB.storeWhiteboardVisibility(this, parentDid, state)
1434→        if (state) {
1435→            whiteboard!!.visibility = View.VISIBLE
1436→            disableDrawerSwipe()
1437→        } else {
1438→            whiteboard!!.visibility = View.GONE
1439→            if (!hasDrawerSwipeConflicts) {
1440→                enableDrawerSwipe()
1441→            }
1442→        }
1443→    }
1444→
1445→    private fun disableDrawerSwipeOnConflicts() {
1446→        if (gestureProcessor.isBound(Gesture.SWIPE_UP, Gesture.SWIPE_DOWN, Gesture.SWIPE_RIGHT)) {
1447→            hasDrawerSwipeConflicts = true
1448→            super.disableDrawerSwipe()
1449→        }
1450→    }
1451→
1452→    override val currentCardId: CardId?
1453→        get() = currentCard!!.id
1454→
1455→    override fun onWindowFocusChanged(hasFocus: Boolean) {
1456→        super.onWindowFocusChanged(hasFocus)
1457→        // Restore full screen once we regain focus
1458→        if (hasFocus) {
1459→            delayedHide(INITIAL_HIDE_DELAY)
1460→        } else {
1461→            fullScreenHandler.removeMessages(0)
1462→        }
1463→    }
1464→
1465→    /**
1466→     * Whether or not dismiss note is available for current card and specified DismissType
1467→     * @return true if there is another card of same note that could be dismissed
1468→     */
1469→    @KotlinCleanup("mCurrentCard handling")
1470→    private fun suspendNoteAvailable(): Boolean {
1471→        return if (currentCard == null) {
1472→            false
1473→        } else {
1474→            getColUnsafe.db.queryScalar(
1475→                "select 1 from cards where nid = ? and id != ? and queue != " + Consts.QUEUE_TYPE_SUSPENDED + " limit 1",
1476→                currentCard!!.nid,
1477→                currentCard!!.id
1478→            ) == 1
1479→        }
1480→        // whether there exists a sibling not buried.
1481→    }
1482→
1483→    @KotlinCleanup("mCurrentCard handling")
1484→    private fun buryNoteAvailable(): Boolean {
1485→        return if (currentCard == null) {
1486→            false
1487→        } else {
1488→            getColUnsafe.db.queryScalar(
1489→                "select 1 from cards where nid = ? and id != ? and queue >=  " + Consts.QUEUE_TYPE_NEW + " limit 1",
1490→                currentCard!!.nid,
1491→                currentCard!!.id
1492→            ) == 1
1493→        }
1494→        // Whether there exists a sibling which is neither suspended nor buried
1495→    }
1496→
1497→    @VisibleForTesting(otherwise = VisibleForTesting.NONE)
1498→    fun hasDrawerSwipeConflicts(): Boolean {
1499→        return hasDrawerSwipeConflicts
1500→    }
1501→
1502→    override fun getCardDataForJsApi(): AnkiDroidJsAPI.CardDataForJsApi {
1503→        val cardDataForJsAPI = AnkiDroidJsAPI.CardDataForJsApi().apply {
1504→            newCardCount = newCount.toString()
1505→            lrnCardCount = lrnCount.toString()
1506→            revCardCount = revCount.toString()
1507→            nextTime1 = easeButton1!!.nextTime
1508→            nextTime2 = easeButton2!!.nextTime
1509→            nextTime3 = easeButton3!!.nextTime
1510→            nextTime4 = easeButton4!!.nextTime
1511→            eta = this@Reviewer.eta
1512→        }
1513→        return cardDataForJsAPI
1514→    }
1515→
1516→    companion object {
1517→        private const val REQUEST_AUDIO_PERMISSION = 0
1518→        private const val ANIMATION_DURATION = 200
1519→        private const val TRANSPARENCY = 0.90f
1520→
1521→        /** Default (500ms) time for action snackbars, such as undo, bury and suspend */
1522→        const val ACTION_SNACKBAR_TIME = 500
1523→    }
1524→}

 16→package com.ichi2.anki.cardviewer
 17→
 18→import android.content.SharedPreferences
 19→import android.view.KeyEvent
 20→import androidx.core.content.edit
 21→import com.ichi2.anki.R
 22→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.Binding.Companion.keyCode
 23→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.Binding.Companion.unicode
 24→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.Binding.ModifierKeys
 25→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.Binding.ModifierKeys.Companion.ctrl
 26→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.Binding.ModifierKeys.Companion.shift
 27→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.CardSide
 28→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.MappableBinding
 29→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.MappableBinding.*
 30→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.MappableBinding.Companion.fromPreference
 31→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.MappableBinding.Companion.toPreferenceString
 32→import java.util.*
 33→import java.util.function.BiFunction
 34→import java.util.stream.Collectors
 35→
 36→/** Abstraction: Discuss moving many of these to 'Reviewer'  */
 37→enum class ViewerCommand(val resourceId: Int) {
 38→    SHOW_ANSWER(R.string.show_answer),
 39→    FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE1(R.string.answer_again),
 40→    FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE2(R.string.answer_hard),
 41→    FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE3(R.string.answer_good),
 42→    FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE4(R.string.answer_easy),
 43→    UNDO(R.string.undo),
 44→    REDO(R.string.redo),
 45→    EDIT(R.string.cardeditor_title_edit_card),
 46→    MARK(R.string.menu_mark_note),
 47→    BURY_CARD(R.string.menu_bury_card),
 48→    SUSPEND_CARD(R.string.menu_suspend_card),
 49→    DELETE(R.string.menu_delete_note),
 50→    PLAY_MEDIA(R.string.gesture_play),
 51→    EXIT(R.string.gesture_abort_learning),
 52→    BURY_NOTE(R.string.menu_bury_note),
 53→    SUSPEND_NOTE(R.string.menu_suspend_note),
 54→    TOGGLE_FLAG_RED(R.string.gesture_flag_red),
 55→    TOGGLE_FLAG_ORANGE(R.string.gesture_flag_orange),
 56→    TOGGLE_FLAG_GREEN(R.string.gesture_flag_green),
 57→    TOGGLE_FLAG_BLUE(R.string.gesture_flag_blue),
 58→    TOGGLE_FLAG_PINK(R.string.gesture_flag_pink),
 59→    TOGGLE_FLAG_TURQUOISE(R.string.gesture_flag_turquoise),
 60→    TOGGLE_FLAG_PURPLE(R.string.gesture_flag_purple),
 61→    UNSET_FLAG(R.string.gesture_flag_remove),
 62→    PAGE_UP(R.string.gesture_page_up),
 63→    PAGE_DOWN(R.string.gesture_page_down),
 64→    TAG(R.string.add_tag),
 65→    CARD_INFO(R.string.card_info_title),
 66→    ABORT_AND_SYNC(R.string.gesture_abort_sync),
 67→    RECORD_VOICE(R.string.record_voice),
 68→    SAVE_VOICE(R.string.save_voice),
 69→    REPLAY_VOICE(R.string.replay_voice),
 70→    TOGGLE_WHITEBOARD(R.string.gesture_toggle_whiteboard),
 71→    CLEAR_WHITEBOARD(R.string.clear_whiteboard),
 72→    CHANGE_WHITEBOARD_PEN_COLOR(R.string.title_whiteboard_editor),
 73→    SHOW_HINT(R.string.gesture_show_hint),
 74→    SHOW_ALL_HINTS(R.string.gesture_show_all_hints),
 75→    ADD_NOTE(R.string.menu_add_note),
 76→    RESCHEDULE_NOTE(R.string.card_editor_reschedule_card);
 77→
 78→    companion object {
 79→        val allDefaultBindings: List<MappableBinding>
 80→            get() = Arrays.stream(entries.toTypedArray())
 81→                .flatMap { x: ViewerCommand -> x.defaultValue.stream() }
 82→                .collect(Collectors.toList())
 83→
 84→        fun fromPreferenceKey(key: String) = ViewerCommand.entries.first { it.preferenceKey == key }
 85→    }
 86→
 87→    val preferenceKey: String
 88→        get() = "binding_$name"
 89→
 90→    fun addBinding(preferences: SharedPreferences, binding: MappableBinding) {
 91→        val addAtStart = BiFunction { collection: MutableList<MappableBinding>, element: MappableBinding ->
 92→            // reorder the elements, moving the added binding to the first position
 93→            collection.remove(element)
 94→            collection.add(0, element)
 95→            true
 96→        }
 97→        addBindingInternal(preferences, binding, addAtStart)
 98→    }
 99→
100→    fun addBindingAtEnd(preferences: SharedPreferences, binding: MappableBinding) {
101→        val addAtEnd = BiFunction { collection: MutableList<MappableBinding>, element: MappableBinding ->
102→            // do not reorder the elements
103→            if (collection.contains(element)) {
104→                return@BiFunction false
105→            }
106→            collection.add(element)
107→            return@BiFunction true
108→        }
109→        addBindingInternal(preferences, binding, addAtEnd)
110→    }
111→
112→    private fun addBindingInternal(preferences: SharedPreferences, binding: MappableBinding, performAdd: BiFunction<MutableList<MappableBinding>, MappableBinding, Boolean>) {
113→        val bindings: MutableList<MappableBinding> = fromPreference(preferences, this)
114→        performAdd.apply(bindings, binding)
115→        val newValue: String = bindings.toPreferenceString()
116→        preferences.edit { putString(preferenceKey, newValue) }
117→    }
118→
119→    fun removeBinding(prefs: SharedPreferences, binding: MappableBinding) {
120→        val bindings: MutableList<MappableBinding> = MappableBinding.fromPreferenceString(preferenceKey)
121→        bindings.remove(binding)
122→        prefs.edit {
123→            putString(preferenceKey, bindings.toPreferenceString())
124→        }
125→    }
126→
127→    // If we use the serialised format, then this adds additional coupling to the properties.
128→    val defaultValue: List<MappableBinding>
129→        get() {
130→            // all of the default commands are currently for the Reviewer
131→            fun keyCode(keycode: Int, side: CardSide, modifierKeys: ModifierKeys = ModifierKeys.none()) =
132→                keyCode(keycode, Screen.Reviewer(side), modifierKeys)
133→            fun unicode(c: Char, side: CardSide) = unicode(c, Screen.Reviewer(side))
134→            return when (this) {
135→                FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE1 -> listOf(
136→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_BUTTON_Y, CardSide.BOTH),
137→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_1, CardSide.ANSWER),
138→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_1, CardSide.ANSWER)
139→                )
140→                FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE2 -> listOf(
141→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_BUTTON_X, CardSide.BOTH),
142→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_2, CardSide.ANSWER),
143→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_2, CardSide.ANSWER)
144→                )
145→                FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE3 -> listOf(
146→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_BUTTON_B, CardSide.BOTH),
147→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_3, CardSide.ANSWER),
148→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_3, CardSide.ANSWER),
149→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_DPAD_CENTER, CardSide.BOTH),
150→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_SPACE, CardSide.ANSWER),
151→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_ENTER, CardSide.ANSWER),
152→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_ENTER, CardSide.ANSWER)
153→                )
154→                FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE4 -> listOf(
155→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_BUTTON_A, CardSide.BOTH),
156→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_4, CardSide.ANSWER),
157→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_4, CardSide.ANSWER)
158→                )
159→                EDIT -> listOf(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_E, CardSide.BOTH))
160→                MARK -> listOf(unicode('*', CardSide.BOTH))
161→                BURY_CARD -> listOf(unicode('-', CardSide.BOTH))
162→                BURY_NOTE -> listOf(unicode('=', CardSide.BOTH))
163→                SUSPEND_CARD -> listOf(unicode('@', CardSide.BOTH))
164→                SUSPEND_NOTE -> listOf(unicode('!', CardSide.BOTH))
165→                PLAY_MEDIA -> listOf(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_R, CardSide.BOTH), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_F5, CardSide.BOTH))
166→                REPLAY_VOICE -> listOf(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_V, CardSide.BOTH))
167→                RECORD_VOICE -> listOf(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_V, CardSide.BOTH, shift()))
168→                SAVE_VOICE -> listOf(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_S, CardSide.BOTH, shift()))
169→                UNDO -> listOf(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_Z, CardSide.BOTH))
170→                REDO -> listOf(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_Z, CardSide.BOTH, ModifierKeys(shift = true, ctrl = true, alt = false)))
171→                TOGGLE_FLAG_RED -> listOf(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_1, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_1, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
172→                TOGGLE_FLAG_ORANGE -> listOf(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_2, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_2, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
173→                TOGGLE_FLAG_GREEN -> listOf(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_3, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_3, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
174→                TOGGLE_FLAG_BLUE -> listOf(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_4, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_4, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
175→                TOGGLE_FLAG_PINK -> listOf(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_5, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_5, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
176→                TOGGLE_FLAG_TURQUOISE -> listOf(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_6, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_6, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
177→                TOGGLE_FLAG_PURPLE -> listOf(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_7, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_7, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
178→                SHOW_HINT -> listOf(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_H, CardSide.BOTH))
179→                SHOW_ALL_HINTS -> listOf(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_G, CardSide.BOTH))
180→                ADD_NOTE -> listOf(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_A, CardSide.BOTH))
181→                else -> emptyList()
182→            }
183→        }
184→
185→    private fun keyCode(keycode: Int, screen: Screen, keys: ModifierKeys = ModifierKeys.none()): MappableBinding {
186→        return MappableBinding(keyCode(keys, keycode), screen)
187→    }
188→
189→    private fun unicode(c: Char, screen: Screen): MappableBinding {
190→        return MappableBinding(unicode(c), screen)
191→    }
192→
193→    fun interface CommandProcessor {
194→        /**
195→         * @return whether the command was executed
196→         */
197→        fun executeCommand(which: ViewerCommand, fromGesture: Gesture?): Boolean
198→    }
199→}
200→

 40→@KotlinCleanup("see if we can make variables lazy, or properties without the `s` prefix")
 41→object UsageAnalytics {
 42→    const val ANALYTICS_OPTIN_KEY = "analytics_opt_in"
 43→
 44→    @KotlinCleanup("lateinit")
 45→    private var sAnalytics: GoogleAnalytics? = null
 46→    private var sOriginalUncaughtExceptionHandler: Thread.UncaughtExceptionHandler? = null
 47→    private var sOptIn = false
 48→    private var sAnalyticsTrackingId: String? = null
 49→    private var sAnalyticsSamplePercentage = -1
 50→
 51→    /**
 52→     * Initialize the analytics provider - must be called prior to sending anything.
 53→     * Usage after that is static
 54→     * Note: may need to implement sampling strategy internally to limit hits, or not track Reviewer...
 55→     *
 56→     * @param context required to look up the analytics codes for the app
 57→     */
 58→    @Synchronized
 59→    fun initialize(context: Context): GoogleAnalytics? {
 60→        Timber.i("initialize()")
 61→        if (sAnalytics == null) {
 62→            Timber.d("App tracking id 'tid' = %s", getAnalyticsTag(context))
 63→            val gaConfig = GoogleAnalyticsConfig()
 64→                .setBatchingEnabled(true)
 65→                .setSamplePercentage(getAnalyticsSamplePercentage(context))
 66→                .setBatchSize(1) // until this handles application termination we will lose hits if batch>1
 67→            sAnalytics = GoogleAnalytics.builder()
 68→                .withTrackingId(getAnalyticsTag(context))
 69→                .withConfig(gaConfig)
 70→                .withDefaultRequest(
 71→                    AndroidDefaultRequest()
 72→                        .setAndroidRequestParameters(context)
 73→                        .applicationName(context.getString(R.string.app_name))
 74→                        .applicationVersion(BuildConfig.VERSION_CODE.toString())
 75→                        .applicationId(BuildConfig.APPLICATION_ID)
 76→                        .trackingId(getAnalyticsTag(context))
 77→                        .clientId(Installation.id(context))
 78→                        .anonymizeIp(context.resources.getBoolean(R.bool.ga_anonymizeIp))
 79→                )
 80→                .withHttpClient(OkHttpClientImpl(gaConfig))
 81→                .build()
 82→        }
 83→        installDefaultExceptionHandler()
 84→        val userPrefs = context.sharedPrefs()
 85→        optIn = userPrefs.getBoolean(ANALYTICS_OPTIN_KEY, false)
 86→        userPrefs.registerOnSharedPreferenceChangeListener { sharedPreferences: SharedPreferences, key: String? ->
 87→            if (key == ANALYTICS_OPTIN_KEY) {
 88→                val newValue = sharedPreferences.getBoolean(key, false)
 89→                Timber.i("Setting analytics opt-in to: %b", newValue)
 90→                optIn = newValue
 91→            }
 92→        }
 93→        return sAnalytics
 94→    }
 95→
 96→    private fun getAnalyticsTag(context: Context): String? {
 97→        if (sAnalyticsTrackingId == null) {
 98→            sAnalyticsTrackingId = context.getString(R.string.ga_trackingId)
 99→        }
100→        return sAnalyticsTrackingId
101→    }
102→
103→    private fun getAnalyticsSamplePercentage(context: Context): Int {
104→        if (sAnalyticsSamplePercentage == -1) {
105→            sAnalyticsSamplePercentage = context.resources.getInteger(R.integer.ga_sampleFrequency)
106→        }
107→        return sAnalyticsSamplePercentage
108→    }

110→    fun setDevMode() {
111→        Timber.d("setDevMode() re-configuring for development analytics tagging")
112→        sAnalyticsTrackingId = "UA-125800786-2"
113→        sAnalyticsSamplePercentage = 100
114→        reInitialize()
115→    }
116→
117→    /**
118→     * We want to send an analytics hit on any exception, then chain to other handlers (e.g., ACRA)
119→     */
120→    @Synchronized
121→    private fun installDefaultExceptionHandler() {
122→        sOriginalUncaughtExceptionHandler = Thread.getDefaultUncaughtExceptionHandler()
123→        Thread.setDefaultUncaughtExceptionHandler { thread: Thread?, throwable: Throwable ->
124→            sendAnalyticsException(throwable, true)
125→            if (thread == null) {
126→                Timber.w("unexpected: thread was null")
127→                return@setDefaultUncaughtExceptionHandler
128→            }
129→            sOriginalUncaughtExceptionHandler!!.uncaughtException(thread, throwable)
130→        }
131→    }
132→
133→    /**
134→     * Reset the default exception handler
135→     */
136→    @Synchronized
137→    private fun unInstallDefaultExceptionHandler() {
138→        Thread.setDefaultUncaughtExceptionHandler(sOriginalUncaughtExceptionHandler)
139→        sOriginalUncaughtExceptionHandler = null
140→    }
141→
142→    /**
143→     * Allow users to enable or disable analytics
144→     */
145→    @set:Synchronized
146→    private var optIn: Boolean
147→        get() {
148→            Timber.d("getOptIn() status: %s", sOptIn)
149→            return sOptIn
150→        }
151→        private set(optIn) {
152→            Timber.i("setOptIn(): from %s to %s", sOptIn, optIn)
153→            sOptIn = optIn
154→            sAnalytics!!.flush()
155→            sAnalytics!!.config.isEnabled = optIn
156→            sAnalytics!!.performSamplingElection()
157→            Timber.d("setOptIn() optIn / sAnalytics.config().enabled(): %s/%s", sOptIn, sAnalytics!!.config.isEnabled)
158→        }
159→
160→    /**
161→     * Set the analytics up to log things, goes to hit validator. Experimental.
162→     *
163→     * @param dryRun set to true if you want to log analytics hit but not dispatch
164→     */
165→    @Synchronized
166→    fun setDryRun(dryRun: Boolean) {
167→        Timber.i("setDryRun(): %s, warning dryRun is experimental", dryRun)
168→    }
169→
170→    /**
171→     * Re-Initialize the analytics provider
172→     */
173→    @Synchronized
174→    fun reInitialize() {
175→        // send any pending async hits, re-chain default exception handlers and re-init
176→        Timber.i("reInitialize()")
177→        sAnalytics!!.flush()
178→        sAnalytics = null
179→        unInstallDefaultExceptionHandler()
180→        initialize(AnkiDroidApp.instance.applicationContext)
181→    }
182→
183→    /**
184→     * Submit a screen for aggregation / analysis.
185→     * Intended for use to determine if / how features are being used
186→     *
187→     * @param object the result of Object.getClass().getSimpleName() will be used as the screen tag
188→     */
189→    @KotlinCleanup("rename object")
190→    fun sendAnalyticsScreenView(`object`: Any) {
191→        sendAnalyticsScreenView(`object`.javaClass.simpleName)
192→    }
193→
194→    /**
195→     * Submit a screen display with a synthetic name for aggregation / analysis
196→     * Intended for use if your class handles multiple screens you want to track separately
197→     *
198→     * @param screenName screenName the name to show in analysis reports
199→     */
200→    fun sendAnalyticsScreenView(screenName: String) {
201→        Timber.d("sendAnalyticsScreenView(): %s", screenName)
202→        if (!optIn) {
203→            return
204→        }
205→        sAnalytics!!.screenView().screenName(screenName).sendAsync()
206→    }
207→
208→    /**
209→     * Send a detailed arbitrary analytics event, with noun/verb pairs and extra data if needed
210→     *
211→     * @param category the category of event, make your own but use a constant so reporting is good
212→     * @param action   the action the user performed
213→     * @param value    A value for the event, Integer.MIN_VALUE signifies caller shouldn't send the value
214→     * @param label    A label for the event, may be null
215→     */
216→    fun sendAnalyticsEvent(category: String, action: String, value: Int? = null, label: String? = null) {
217→        Timber.d("sendAnalyticsEvent() category/action/value/label: %s/%s/%s/%s", category, action, value, label)
218→        if (!optIn) {
219→            return
220→        }
221→        val event = sAnalytics!!.event().eventCategory(category).eventAction(action)
222→        if (label != null) {
223→            event.eventLabel(label)
224→        }
225→        if (value != null) {
226→            event.eventValue(value)
227→        }
228→        event.sendAsync()
229→    }
230→
231→    /**
232→     * Send an exception event out for aggregation/analysis, parsed from the exception information
233→     *
234→     * @param t     Throwable to send for analysis
235→     * @param fatal whether it was fatal or not
236→     */
237→    fun sendAnalyticsException(t: Throwable, fatal: Boolean) {
238→        sendAnalyticsException(getCause(t).toString(), fatal)
239→    }
240→
241→    @KotlinCleanup("convert to sequence")
242→    fun getCause(t: Throwable): Throwable {
243→        var cause: Throwable?
244→        var result = t
245→        while (null != result.cause.also { cause = it } && result != cause) {
246→            result = cause!!
247→        }
248→        return result
249→    }
250→
251→    /**
252→     * Send an exception event out for aggregation/analysis
253→     *
254→     * @param description API limited to 100 characters, truncated here to 100 if needed
255→     * @param fatal       whether it was fatal or not
256→     */
257→    fun sendAnalyticsException(description: String, fatal: Boolean) {
258→        Timber.d("sendAnalyticsException() description/fatal: %s/%s", description, fatal)
259→        if (!sOptIn) {
260→            return
261→        }
262→        sAnalytics!!.exception().exceptionDescription(description).exceptionFatal(fatal).sendAsync()
263→    }

265→    internal fun canGetDefaultUserAgent(): Boolean {
266→        // #5502 - getDefaultUserAgent starts a WebView. We can't have two WebViews with the same data directory.
267→        // But ACRA starts an :acra process which does not terminate when AnkiDroid is restarted. https://crbug.com/558377
268→
269→        // if we're not under the ACRA process then we're fine to initialize a WebView
270→        return if (!ACRA.isACRASenderServiceProcess()) {
271→            true
272→        } else {
273→            hasSetDataDirectory()
274→        }
275→
276→        // If we have a custom data directory, then the crash will not occur.
277→    }

281→        get() {
282→            val userPrefs = AnkiDroidApp.instance.sharedPrefs()
283→            return userPrefs.getBoolean(ANALYTICS_OPTIN_KEY, false)
284→        }
285→        set(value) {
286→            // A listener on this preference handles the rest
287→            AnkiDroidApp.instance.sharedPrefs().edit {
288→                putBoolean(ANALYTICS_OPTIN_KEY, value)
289→            }
290→        }

297→    /**
298→     * An Android-specific device config generator. Without this it's "Desktop" and unknown for all hardware.
299→     * It is interesting to us what devices people use though (for instance: is Amazon Kindle support worth it?
300→     * Is anyone still using e-ink devices? How many people are on tablets? ChromeOS?)
301→     */
302→    private class AndroidDefaultRequest : DefaultRequest() {
303→        fun setAndroidRequestParameters(context: Context): DefaultRequest {
304→            // Are we running on really large screens or small screens? Send raw screen size
305→            try {
306→                val size = DisplayUtils.getDisplayDimensions(context)
307→                this.screenResolution(size.x.toString() + "x" + size.y)
308→            } catch (e: RuntimeException) {
309→                Timber.w(e)
310→                // nothing much to do here, it means we couldn't get WindowManager
311→            }
312→
313→            // We can have up to 20 of these - there might be other things we want to know
314→            // but simply seeing what hardware we are running on should be useful
315→            this.customDimension(1, Build.VERSION.RELEASE) // systemVersion, e.g. "7.1.1"  for Android 7.1.1
316→            this.customDimension(2, Build.BRAND) // brand e.g. "OnePlus"
317→            this.customDimension(3, Build.MODEL) // model e.g. "ONEPLUS A6013" for the 6T
318→            this.customDimension(4, Build.BOARD) // deviceId e.g. "sdm845" for the 6T
319→
320→            // This is important for google to auto-fingerprint us for default reporting
321→            // It is not possible to set operating system explicitly, there is no API or analytics parameter for it
322→            // Instead they respond that they auto-parse User-Agent strings for analytics attribution
323→            // For maximum analytics built-in report compatibility we will send the official WebView User-Agent string
324→            try {
325→                if (canGetDefaultUserAgent()) {
326→                    this.userAgent(WebSettings.getDefaultUserAgent(context))
327→                } else {
328→                    this.userAgent(System.getProperty("http.agent"))
329→                }
330→            } catch (e: RuntimeException) {
331→                Timber.w(e)
332→                // Catch RuntimeException as WebView initialization blows up in unpredictable ways
333→                // but analytics should never be a show-stopper
334→                this.userAgent(System.getProperty("http.agent"))
335→            }
336→            return this
337→        }
338→    }

conversationHistory.content:
You are working on the ankidroid/Anki-Android repository.
The codebase is at version 2.16 (commit: a8117a0a).

## Issue to Resolve

Request to make "Reschedule" as one of the command mapping controller button options
     Is it possible to make "Reschedule" as one of the command mapping controller button options? I would like to be able to reschedule a card to a different date as needed with a touch of a gesture or button on a game controller without having to tap multiple times to reach the "Reschedule for review in x days"  option for a specific card. 
     Simply put, I would like to be able to do a certain gesture or click a single button to reach the "Reschedule" option like we can do for "Bury card", "Undo", etc. Please let me know if there's already a way to do this! Thank you all so much!!

## Additional Context from Issue Discussion

Yes, it is possible. Pretty valid feature request
Oh, that's awesome! Thank you so much!
Hi, I would like to work on this feature request! And if I can work, is the way to solve it is just segregate the 2 options which are in reschedule tab to the main tab?
Hello @parthn2. We appreciate the work.

For now, there is no need to do a command for `Reset progress`. Just the `Reschedule` command asked by the OP is enough
> Hello @parthn2. We appreciate the work.
> 
> For now, there is no need to do a command for `Reset progress`. Just the `Reschedule` command asked by the OP is enough

Okay!! But wouldn't it just make it useless to go 2 clicks for 'Reset' because no one will be using 2 clicks for 'Reschedule' because it is just one click away. So why not break that into 2 if it is the correct thing?
> because no one will be using 2 clicks for 'Reschedule' because it is just one click away.

Not everybody is going to add a gesture for Reschedule, so it may be still be a 2 taps action.

## Relevant Files

The following files are likely relevant to solving this issue:
- `AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/Reviewer.kt`
- `AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/analytics/UsageAnalytics.kt`
- `AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/cardviewer/ViewerCommand.kt`

## Instructions

Please analyze this issue and implement a fix. Make the necessary code changes to resolve the problem described above.

Focus on:
- Understanding the root cause of the issue
- Making minimal, targeted changes to fix the problem
- Ensuring your changes don't break existing functionality

## Important Evaluation Notes

**Your work will be evaluated by running hidden tests that you do not have access to.** These tests will verify that your fix correctly addresses the issue. You should be confident in your solution before finishing.
**If you write tests to verify your changes, create them in NEW test files only** - do NOT modify existing test files

## CRITICAL RESTRICTIONS

**NEVER use git commands.** Do not run `git status`, `git diff`, `git checkout`, `git reset`, or ANY other git commands. Using git will corrupt the evaluation environment and invalidate your entire submission. All file operations should be done through normal file editing and reading tools, not git.

I'll help you implement this feature to make "Reschedule" available as a command mapping controller button option. Let me start by examining the relevant files to understand the current implementation.

 43→    FLIP_OR_ANSWER_BETTER_THAN_RECOMMENDED(R.string.gesture_answer_better_recommended),
 44→    UNDO(R.string.undo),
 45→    EDIT(R.string.cardeditor_title_edit_card),
 46→    MARK(R.string.menu_mark_note),
 47→    BURY_CARD(R.string.menu_bury_card),
 48→    SUSPEND_CARD(R.string.menu_suspend_card),
 49→    DELETE(R.string.menu_delete_note),
 50→    PLAY_MEDIA(R.string.gesture_play),
 51→    EXIT(R.string.gesture_abort_learning),
 52→    BURY_NOTE(R.string.menu_bury_note),
 53→    SUSPEND_NOTE(R.string.menu_suspend_note),
 54→    TOGGLE_FLAG_RED(R.string.gesture_flag_red),
 55→    TOGGLE_FLAG_ORANGE(R.string.gesture_flag_orange),
 56→    TOGGLE_FLAG_GREEN(R.string.gesture_flag_green),
 57→    TOGGLE_FLAG_BLUE(R.string.gesture_flag_blue),
 58→    TOGGLE_FLAG_PINK(R.string.gesture_flag_pink),
 59→    TOGGLE_FLAG_TURQUOISE(R.string.gesture_flag_turquoise),
 60→    TOGGLE_FLAG_PURPLE(R.string.gesture_flag_purple),
 61→    UNSET_FLAG(R.string.gesture_flag_remove),
 62→    PAGE_UP(R.string.gesture_page_up),
 63→    PAGE_DOWN(R.string.gesture_page_down),
 64→    TAG(R.string.add_tag),
 65→    CARD_INFO(R.string.card_info_title),
 66→    ABORT_AND_SYNC(R.string.gesture_abort_sync),
 67→    RECORD_VOICE(R.string.record_voice),
 68→    REPLAY_VOICE(R.string.replay_voice),
 69→    TOGGLE_WHITEBOARD(R.string.gesture_toggle_whiteboard),
 70→    CLEAR_WHITEBOARD(R.string.clear_whiteboard),
 71→    CHANGE_WHITEBOARD_PEN_COLOR(R.string.title_whiteboard_editor),
 72→    SHOW_HINT(R.string.gesture_show_hint),
 73→    SHOW_ALL_HINTS(R.string.gesture_show_all_hints),
 74→    ADD_NOTE(R.string.menu_add_note);
 75→
 76→    companion object {
 77→        val allDefaultBindings: List<MappableBinding>
 78→            get() = Arrays.stream(values())
 79→                .flatMap { x: ViewerCommand -> x.defaultValue.stream() }
 80→                .collect(Collectors.toList())
 81→    }
 82→
 83→    val preferenceKey: String
 84→        get() = "binding_$name"
 85→
 86→    fun addBinding(preferences: SharedPreferences, binding: MappableBinding) {
 87→        val addAtStart = BiFunction { collection: MutableList<MappableBinding>, element: MappableBinding ->
 88→            // reorder the elements, moving the added binding to the first position
 89→            collection.remove(element)
 90→            collection.add(0, element)
 91→            true
 92→        }
 93→        addBindingInternal(preferences, binding, addAtStart)
 94→    }
 95→
 96→    fun addBindingAtEnd(preferences: SharedPreferences, binding: MappableBinding) {
 97→        val addAtEnd = BiFunction { collection: MutableList<MappableBinding>, element: MappableBinding ->
 98→            // do not reorder the elements
 99→            if (collection.contains(element)) {
100→                return@BiFunction false
101→            }
102→            collection.add(element)
103→            return@BiFunction true
104→        }
105→        addBindingInternal(preferences, binding, addAtEnd)
106→    }
107→
108→    private fun addBindingInternal(preferences: SharedPreferences, binding: MappableBinding, performAdd: BiFunction<MutableList<MappableBinding>, MappableBinding, Boolean>) {
109→        val bindings: MutableList<MappableBinding> = fromPreference(preferences, this)
110→        performAdd.apply(bindings, binding)
111→        val newValue: String = bindings.toPreferenceString()
112→        preferences.edit { putString(preferenceKey, newValue) }
113→    }
114→
115→    fun removeBinding(prefs: SharedPreferences, binding: MappableBinding) {
116→        val bindings: MutableList<MappableBinding> = MappableBinding.fromPreferenceString(preferenceKey)
117→        bindings.remove(binding)
118→        prefs.edit {
119→            putString(preferenceKey, bindings.toPreferenceString())
120→        }
121→    }
122→
123→    // If we use the serialised format, then this adds additional coupling to the properties.
124→    val defaultValue: List<MappableBinding>
125→        get() = // If we use the serialised format, then this adds additional coupling to the properties.
126→            when (this) {
127→                FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE1 -> from(
128→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_BUTTON_Y, CardSide.BOTH),
129→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_1, CardSide.ANSWER),
130→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_1, CardSide.ANSWER)
131→                )
132→                FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE2 -> from(
133→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_BUTTON_X, CardSide.BOTH),
134→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_2, CardSide.ANSWER),
135→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_2, CardSide.ANSWER)
136→                )
137→                FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE3 -> from(
138→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_BUTTON_B, CardSide.BOTH),
139→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_3, CardSide.ANSWER),
140→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_3, CardSide.ANSWER)
141→                )
142→                FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE4 -> from(
143→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_BUTTON_A, CardSide.BOTH),
144→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_4, CardSide.ANSWER),
145→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_4, CardSide.ANSWER)
146→                )
147→                FLIP_OR_ANSWER_RECOMMENDED -> from(
148→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_DPAD_CENTER, CardSide.BOTH),
149→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_SPACE, CardSide.ANSWER),
150→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_ENTER, CardSide.ANSWER),
151→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_ENTER, CardSide.ANSWER)
152→                )
153→                EDIT -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_E, CardSide.BOTH))
154→                MARK -> from(unicode('*', CardSide.BOTH))
155→                BURY_CARD -> from(unicode('-', CardSide.BOTH))
156→                BURY_NOTE -> from(unicode('=', CardSide.BOTH))
157→                SUSPEND_CARD -> from(unicode('@', CardSide.BOTH))
158→                SUSPEND_NOTE -> from(unicode('!', CardSide.BOTH))
159→                PLAY_MEDIA -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_R, CardSide.BOTH), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_F5, CardSide.BOTH))
160→                REPLAY_VOICE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_V, CardSide.BOTH))
161→                RECORD_VOICE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_V, CardSide.BOTH, shift()))
162→                UNDO -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_Z, CardSide.BOTH))
163→                TOGGLE_FLAG_RED -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_1, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_1, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
164→                TOGGLE_FLAG_ORANGE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_2, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_2, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
165→                TOGGLE_FLAG_GREEN -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_3, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_3, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
166→                TOGGLE_FLAG_BLUE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_4, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_4, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
167→                TOGGLE_FLAG_PINK -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_5, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_5, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
168→                TOGGLE_FLAG_TURQUOISE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_6, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_6, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
169→                TOGGLE_FLAG_PURPLE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_7, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_7, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
170→                SHOW_HINT -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_H, CardSide.BOTH))
171→                SHOW_ALL_HINTS -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_G, CardSide.BOTH))
172→                ADD_NOTE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_A, CardSide.BOTH))
173→                else -> ArrayList()
174→            }
175→
176→    private fun keyCode(keycode: Int, side: CardSide, keys: ModifierKeys): MappableBinding {
177→        return MappableBinding(keyCode(keys, keycode), MappableBinding.Screen.Reviewer(side))
178→    }
179→
180→    private fun unicode(c: Char, side: CardSide): MappableBinding {
181→        return MappableBinding(unicode(c), MappableBinding.Screen.Reviewer(side))
182→    }
183→
184→    private fun from(vararg bindings: MappableBinding): List<MappableBinding> {
185→        return ArrayList(listOf(*bindings))
186→    }
187→
188→    private fun keyCode(keyCode: Int, side: CardSide): MappableBinding {
189→        return MappableBinding(keyCode(keyCode), MappableBinding.Screen.Reviewer(side))
190→    }
191→
192→    fun interface CommandProcessor {
193→        /**
194→         *
195→         * example failure: answering an ease on the front of the card
196→         */
197→        fun executeCommand(which: ViewerCommand, fromGesture: Gesture?): Boolean
198→    }
199→}

  95→@KotlinCleanup("too many to count")
  96→open class Reviewer :
  97→    AbstractFlashcardViewer(),
  98→    ReviewerUi {
  99→    private var mHasDrawerSwipeConflicts = false
 100→    private var mShowWhiteboard = true
 101→    private var mPrefFullscreenReview = false
 102→    private lateinit var mColorPalette: LinearLayout
 103→    private var toggleStylus = false
 104→
 105→    // TODO: Consider extracting to ViewModel
 106→    // Card counts
 107→    private var mNewCount: SpannableString? = null
 108→    private var mLrnCount: SpannableString? = null
 109→    private var mRevCount: SpannableString? = null
 110→    private lateinit var mTextBarNew: TextView
 111→    private lateinit var mTextBarLearn: TextView
 112→    private lateinit var mTextBarReview: TextView
 113→    private lateinit var answerTimer: AnswerTimer
 114→    private var mPrefHideDueCount = false
 115→
 116→    // Whiteboard
 117→    var prefWhiteboard = false
 118→
 119→    @get:CheckResult
 120→    @get:VisibleForTesting(otherwise = VisibleForTesting.NONE)
 121→    var whiteboard: Whiteboard? = null
 122→        protected set
 123→
 124→    // Record Audio
 125→    /** File of the temporary mic record  */
 126→    @get:VisibleForTesting(otherwise = VisibleForTesting.NONE)
 127→    var audioView: AudioView? = null
 128→        protected set
 129→    private var tempAudioPath: String? = null
 130→
 131→    // ETA
 132→    private var mEta = 0
 133→    private var mPrefShowETA = false
 134→
 135→    /** Handle Mark/Flag state of cards  */
 136→    private var mCardMarker: CardMarker? = null
 137→
 138→    // Preferences from the collection
 139→    private var mShowRemainingCardCount = false
 140→    private val mActionButtons = ActionButtons(this)
 141→    private lateinit var mToolbar: Toolbar
 142→
 143→    @VisibleForTesting
 144→    protected val mProcessor = PeripheralKeymap(this, this)
 145→    private val mOnboarding = Onboarding.Reviewer(this)
 146→    protected fun <T : Computation<NextCard<Array<Card>>>?> scheduleCollectionTaskHandler(@PluralsRes toastResourceId: Int): TaskListenerBuilder<Unit, T> {
 147→        return nextCardHandler<Computation<NextCard<*>>?>().alsoExecuteAfter { result: T ->
 148→            // BUG: If the method crashes, this will crash
 149→            invalidateOptionsMenu()
 150→            val cardCount: Int = result!!.value.result.size
 151→            showSnackbar(
 152→                resources.getQuantityString(toastResourceId, cardCount, cardCount),
 153→                Snackbar.LENGTH_SHORT
 154→            )
 155→        }
 156→    }
 157→
 158→    override fun onCreate(savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {
 159→        if (showedActivityFailedScreen(savedInstanceState)) {
 160→            return
 161→        }
 162→        super.onCreate(savedInstanceState)
 163→        if (handledLaunchFromWebBrowser(intent, this)) {
 164→            this.setResult(RESULT_CANCELED)
 165→            finishWithAnimation(ActivityTransitionAnimation.Direction.END)
 166→            return
 167→        }
 168→        mColorPalette = findViewById(R.id.whiteboard_editor)
 169→        answerTimer = AnswerTimer(findViewById(R.id.card_time))
 170→        mTextBarNew = findViewById(R.id.new_number)
 171→        mTextBarLearn = findViewById(R.id.learn_number)
 172→        mTextBarReview = findViewById(R.id.review_number)
 173→        mToolbar = findViewById(R.id.toolbar)
 174→        startLoadingCollection()
 175→    }
 176→
 177→    override fun onPause() {
 178→        answerTimer.pause()
 179→        super.onPause()
 180→    }
 181→
 182→    override fun onResume() {
 183→        answerTimer.resume()
 184→        super.onResume()
 185→        if (answerField != null) {
 186→            answerField!!.focusWithKeyboard()
 187→        }
 188→    }
 189→
 190→    @NeedsTest("is hidden if flag is on app bar")
 191→    @NeedsTest("is not hidden if flag is not on app bar")
 192→    @NeedsTest("is not hidden if flag is on app bar and fullscreen is enabled")
 193→    protected val flagToDisplay: Int
 194→        get() {
 195→            val actualValue = currentCard!!.userFlag()
 196→            if (actualValue == CardMarker.FLAG_NONE) {
 197→                return CardMarker.FLAG_NONE
 198→            }
 199→            val shownAsToolbarButton = mActionButtons.findMenuItem(ActionButtons.RES_FLAG)?.isActionButton == true
 200→            return if (shownAsToolbarButton && !mPrefFullscreenReview) {
 201→                CardMarker.FLAG_NONE
 202→            } else {
 203→                actualValue
 204→            }
 205→        }
 206→
 207→    override fun recreateWebView() {
 208→        super.recreateWebView()
 209→        setRenderWorkaround(this)
 210→    }
 211→
 212→    @NeedsTest("is hidden if marked is on app bar")
 213→    @NeedsTest("is not hidden if marked is not on app bar")
 214→    @NeedsTest("is not hidden if marked is on app bar and fullscreen is enabled")
 215→    override fun shouldDisplayMark(): Boolean {
 216→        val markValue = super.shouldDisplayMark()
 217→        if (!markValue) {
 218→            return false
 219→        }
 220→
 221→        // If we don't know: assume it's not shown
 222→        val shownAsToolbarButton = mActionButtons.findMenuItem(ActionButtons.RES_MARK)?.isActionButton == true
 223→        return !shownAsToolbarButton || mPrefFullscreenReview
 224→    }
 225→
 226→    protected open fun onMark(card: Card?) {
 227→        if (card == null) {
 228→            return
 229→        }
 230→        launchCatchingTask {
 231→            toggleMark(card.note())
 232→            refreshActionBar()
 233→            onMarkChanged()
 234→        }
 235→    }
 236→
 237→    private fun onMarkChanged() {
 238→        if (currentCard == null) {
 239→            return
 240→        }
 241→        mCardMarker!!.displayMark(shouldDisplayMark())
 242→    }
 243→
 244→    protected open fun onFlag(card: Card?, flag: Int) {
 245→        if (card == null) {
 246→            return
 247→        }
 248→        launchCatchingTask {
 249→            card.setUserFlag(flag)
 250→            if (BackendFactory.defaultLegacySchema) {
 251→                card.flush()
 252→                /* Following code would allow to update value of {{cardFlag}}.
 253→               Anki does not update this value when a flag is changed, so
 254→               currently this code would do something that anki itself
 255→               does not do. I hope in the future Anki will correct that
 256→               and this code may becomes useful.
 257→
 258→            card._getQA(true); //force reload. Useful iff {{cardFlag}} occurs in the template
 259→            if (sDisplayAnswer) {
 260→                displayCardAnswer();
 261→            } else {
 262→                displayCardQuestion();
 263→                } */
 264→            } else {
 265→                withCol {
 266→                    newBackend.setUserFlagForCards(listOf(card.id), flag)
 267→                }
 268→            }
 269→            refreshActionBar()
 270→            onFlagChanged()
 271→        }
 272→    }
 273→
 274→    private fun onFlagChanged() {
 275→        if (currentCard == null) {
 276→            return
 277→        }
 278→        mCardMarker!!.displayFlag(flagToDisplay)
 279→    }
 280→
 281→    private fun selectDeckFromExtra() {
 282→        val extras = intent.extras
 283→        if (extras == null || !extras.containsKey("deckId")) {
 284→            // deckId is not set, load default
 285→            return
 286→        }
 287→        val did = extras.getLong("deckId", Long.MIN_VALUE)
 288→        Timber.d("selectDeckFromExtra() with deckId = %d", did)
 289→
 290→        // deckId does not exist, load default
 291→        if (col.decks.get(did, _default = false) == null) {
 292→            Timber.w("selectDeckFromExtra() deckId '%d' doesn't exist", did)
 293→            return
 294→        }
 295→
 296→        // Clear the undo history when selecting a new deck
 297→        if (col.decks.selected() != did) {
 298→            col.clearUndo()
 299→        }
 300→        // Select the deck
 301→        col.decks.select(did)
 302→        // Reset the schedule so that we get the counts for the currently selected deck
 303→        col.sched.deferReset()
 304→    }
 305→
 306→    override fun getContentViewAttr(fullscreenMode: FullScreenMode): Int {
 307→        return when (fullscreenMode) {
 308→            FullScreenMode.BUTTONS_ONLY -> R.layout.reviewer_fullscreen
 309→            FullScreenMode.FULLSCREEN_ALL_GONE -> R.layout.reviewer_fullscreen_noanswers
 310→            else -> R.layout.reviewer
 311→        }
 312→    }
 313→
 314→    public override fun fitsSystemWindows(): Boolean {
 315→        return !fullscreenMode.isFullScreenReview()
 316→    }
 317→
 318→    override fun onCollectionLoaded(col: Collection) {
 319→        super.onCollectionLoaded(col)
 320→        if (Intent.ACTION_VIEW == intent.action) {
 321→            Timber.d("onCreate() :: received Intent with action = %s", intent.action)
 322→            selectDeckFromExtra()
 323→        }
 324→        // Load the first card and start reviewing. Uses the answer card
 325→        // task to load a card, but since we send null
 326→        // as the card to answer, no card will be answered.
 327→        prefWhiteboard = MetaDB.getWhiteboardState(this, parentDid)
 328→        if (prefWhiteboard) {
 329→            // DEFECT: Slight inefficiency here, as we set the database using these methods
 330→            val whiteboardVisibility = MetaDB.getWhiteboardVisibility(this, parentDid)
 331→            setWhiteboardEnabledState(true)
 332→            setWhiteboardVisibility(whiteboardVisibility)
 333→            toggleStylus = MetaDB.getWhiteboardStylusState(this, parentDid)
 334→            whiteboard!!.toggleStylus = toggleStylus
 335→        }
 336→        col.sched.deferReset() // Reset schedule in case card was previously loaded
 337→        col.startTimebox()
 338→        GetCard().runWithHandler(answerCardHandler(false))
 339→        disableDrawerSwipeOnConflicts()
 340→        // Add a weak reference to current activity so that scheduler can talk to to Activity
 341→        sched!!.setContext(WeakReference(this))
 342→
 343→        // Set full screen/immersive mode if needed
 344→        if (mPrefFullscreenReview) {
 345→            setFullScreen(this)
 346→        }
 347→        setRenderWorkaround(this)
 348→    }
 349→
 350→    override fun onOptionsItemSelected(item: MenuItem): Boolean {
 351→        // 100ms was not enough on my device (Honor 9 Lite -  Android Pie)
 352→        delayedHide(1000)
 353→        if (drawerToggle.onOptionsItemSelected(item)) {
 354→            return true
 355→        }
 356→        when (item.itemId) {
 357→            android.R.id.home -> {
 358→                Timber.i("Reviewer:: Home button pressed")
 359→                closeReviewer(RESULT_OK, true)
 360→            }
 361→            R.id.action_undo -> {
 362→                Timber.i("Reviewer:: Undo button pressed")
 363→                if (mShowWhiteboard && whiteboard != null && !whiteboard!!.undoEmpty()) {
 364→                    whiteboard!!.undo()
 365→                } else {
 366→                    undo()
 367→                }
 368→            }
 369→            R.id.action_reset_card_progress -> {
 370→                Timber.i("Reviewer:: Reset progress button pressed")
 371→                showResetCardDialog()
 372→            }
 373→            R.id.action_mark_card -> {
 374→                Timber.i("Reviewer:: Mark button pressed")
 375→                onMark(currentCard)
 376→            }
 377→            R.id.action_replay -> {
 378→                Timber.i("Reviewer:: Replay audio button pressed (from menu)")
 379→                playSounds(true)
 380→            }
 381→            R.id.action_toggle_mic_tool_bar -> {
 382→                Timber.i("Reviewer:: Record mic")
 383→                // Check permission to record and request if not granted
 384→                openOrToggleMicToolbar()

 386→            R.id.action_tag -> {
 387→                Timber.i("Reviewer:: Tag button pressed")
 388→                showTagsDialog()

 391→                Timber.i("Reviewer:: Edit note button pressed")

 394→            R.id.action_bury -> {
 395→                Timber.i("Reviewer:: Bury button pressed")
 396→                MenuItemCompat.getActionProvider(item)?.hasSubMenu()?.let { isAvailable ->
 397→                    if (!isAvailable) {
 398→                        Timber.d("Bury card due to no submenu")
 399→                        buryCard()
 400→                    }
 401→                } ?: Timber.w("Null ActionProvider for bury menu item in Reviewer!")
 402→            }
 403→            R.id.action_suspend -> {
 404→                Timber.i("Reviewer:: Suspend button pressed")
 405→                MenuItemCompat.getActionProvider(item)?.hasSubMenu()?.let { isAvailable ->
 406→                    if (!isAvailable) {
 407→                        Timber.d("Suspend card due to no submenu")
 408→                        suspendCard()

 410→                } ?: Timber.w("Null ActionProvider for suspend menu item in Reviewer!")

 412→            R.id.action_delete -> {

 416→            R.id.action_change_whiteboard_pen_color -> {

 420→            R.id.action_save_whiteboard -> {

 425→                        showSnackbar(getString(R.string.white_board_image_saved, savedWhiteboardFileName), Snackbar.LENGTH_SHORT)
 426→                    } catch (e: Exception) {

 428→                        showSnackbar(getString(R.string.white_board_image_save_failed, e.localizedMessage), Snackbar.LENGTH_SHORT)

 432→            R.id.action_clear_whiteboard -> {

 436→            R.id.action_hide_whiteboard -> { // toggle whiteboard visibility
 437→                Timber.i("Reviewer:: Whiteboard visibility set to %b", !mShowWhiteboard)
 438→                setWhiteboardVisibility(!mShowWhiteboard)
 439→                refreshActionBar()

 441→            R.id.action_toggle_stylus -> { // toggle stylus mode

 483→            R.id.action_flag_four -> {
 484→                Timber.i("Reviewer:: Flag four")
 485→                onFlag(currentCard, CardMarker.FLAG_BLUE)
 486→            }
 487→            R.id.action_flag_five -> {
 488→                Timber.i("Reviewer:: Flag five")
 489→                onFlag(currentCard, CardMarker.FLAG_PINK)
 490→            }
 491→            R.id.action_flag_six -> {
 492→                Timber.i("Reviewer:: Flag six")
 493→                onFlag(currentCard, CardMarker.FLAG_TURQUOISE)

 575→    override fun closeReviewer(result: Int, saveDeck: Boolean) {
 576→        // Stop the mic recording if still pending
 577→        audioView?.notifyStopRecord()
 578→
 579→        // Remove the temporary audio file
 580→        tempAudioPath?.let {
 581→            val tempAudioPathToDelete = File(it)
 582→            if (tempAudioPathToDelete.exists()) {
 583→                tempAudioPathToDelete.delete()
 584→            }
 585→        }
 586→        super.closeReviewer(result, saveDeck)
 587→    }

 589→    /**
 590→     *
 591→     * @return Whether the mic toolbar is usable
 592→     */
 593→    @VisibleForTesting
 594→    fun openMicToolbar(): Boolean {
 595→        if (audioView == null || audioView!!.visibility != View.VISIBLE) {
 596→            openOrToggleMicToolbar()
 597→        }
 598→        return audioView != null
 599→    }
 600→
 601→    private fun openOrToggleMicToolbar() {
 602→        if (!canRecordAudio(this)) {
 603→            ActivityCompat.requestPermissions(
 604→                this,
 605→                arrayOf(Manifest.permission.RECORD_AUDIO),
 606→                REQUEST_AUDIO_PERMISSION
 607→            )
 608→        } else {
 609→            toggleMicToolBar()
 610→        }
 611→    }
 612→
 613→    private fun toggleMicToolBar() {
 614→        audioView?.let {
 615→            it.visibility = if (it.visibility != View.VISIBLE) View.VISIBLE else View.GONE
 616→            return
 617→        }
 618→        // Record mic tool bar does not exist yet
 619→        tempAudioPath = generateTempAudioFile(this)
 620→        if (tempAudioPath == null) {
 621→            return
 622→        }
 623→        audioView = createRecorderInstance(
 624→            this,
 625→            R.drawable.ic_play_arrow_white_24dp,
 626→            R.drawable.ic_pause_white_24dp,
 627→            R.drawable.ic_stop_white_24dp,
 628→            R.drawable.ic_rec,
 629→            R.drawable.ic_rec_stop,
 630→            tempAudioPath!!
 631→        )
 632→        if (audioView == null) {
 633→            tempAudioPath = null
 634→            return
 635→        }
 636→        val lp2 = FrameLayout.LayoutParams(
 637→            ViewGroup.LayoutParams.MATCH_PARENT,
 638→            ViewGroup.LayoutParams.MATCH_PARENT
 639→        )
 640→        audioView!!.layoutParams = lp2
 641→        val micToolBarLayer = findViewById<LinearLayout>(R.id.mic_tool_bar_layer)
 642→        micToolBarLayer.addView(audioView)
 643→    }

 645→    override fun onRequestPermissionsResult(requestCode: Int, permissions: Array<String>, grantResults: IntArray) {
 646→        super.onRequestPermissionsResult(requestCode, permissions, grantResults)
 647→        if (requestCode == REQUEST_AUDIO_PERMISSION &&
 648→            permissions.isNotEmpty() && grantResults[0] == PackageManager.PERMISSION_GRANTED
 649→        ) {
 650→            // Get get audio record permission, so we can create the record tool bar
 651→            toggleMicToolBar()
 652→        }
 653→    }

 681→    @NeedsTest("Starting animation from swipe is inverse to the finishing one")
 682→    private fun addNote(fromGesture: Gesture? = null) {
 683→        val intent = Intent(this, NoteEditor::class.java)
 684→        val animation = getAnimationTransitionFromGesture(fromGesture)
 685→        intent.putExtra(NoteEditor.EXTRA_CALLER, NoteEditor.CALLER_REVIEWER_ADD)
 686→        intent.putExtra(FINISH_ANIMATION_EXTRA, getInverseTransition(animation) as Parcelable)
 687→        startActivityForResultWithAnimation(intent, ADD_NOTE, animation)
 688→    }

 690→    @NeedsTest("Starting animation from swipe is inverse to the finishing one")
 691→    protected fun openCardInfo(fromGesture: Gesture? = null) {
 692→        if (currentCard == null) {
 693→            showSnackbar(getString(R.string.multimedia_editor_something_wrong), Snackbar.LENGTH_SHORT)
 694→            return
 695→        }
 696→        val intent = if (BackendFactory.defaultLegacySchema) {
 697→            Intent(this, CardInfo::class.java).apply {
 698→                putExtra("cardId", currentCard!!.id)
 699→            }
 700→        } else {
 701→            com.ichi2.anki.pages.CardInfo.getIntent(this, currentCard!!.id)
 702→        }
 703→        val animation = getAnimationTransitionFromGesture(fromGesture)
 704→        intent.putExtra(FINISH_ANIMATION_EXTRA, getInverseTransition(animation) as Parcelable)
 705→        startActivityWithAnimation(intent, animation)
 706→    }

 708→    // Related to https://github.com/ankidroid/Anki-Android/pull/11061#issuecomment-1107868455
 709→    @NeedsTest("Order of operations needs Testing around Menu (Overflow) Icons and their colors.")
 710→    override fun onCreateOptionsMenu(menu: Menu): Boolean {
 711→        Timber.d("onCreateOptionsMenu()")
 712→        // NOTE: This is called every time a new question is shown via invalidate options menu
 713→        menuInflater.inflate(R.menu.reviewer, menu)
 714→        displayIcons(menu)
 715→        mActionButtons.setCustomButtonsStatus(menu)
 716→        var alpha = if (super.controlBlocked !== ReviewerUi.ControlBlock.SLOW) Themes.ALPHA_ICON_ENABLED_LIGHT else Themes.ALPHA_ICON_DISABLED_LIGHT
 717→        val markCardIcon = menu.findItem(R.id.action_mark_card)
 718→        if (currentCard != null && isMarked(currentCard!!.note())) {
 719→            markCardIcon.setTitle(R.string.menu_unmark_note).setIcon(R.drawable.ic_star_white)
 720→        } else {
 721→            markCardIcon.setTitle(R.string.menu_mark_note).setIcon(R.drawable.ic_star_border_white)
 722→        }
 723→        markCardIcon.iconAlpha = alpha
 724→
 725→        val flagIcon = menu.findItem(R.id.action_flag)
 726→        if (flagIcon != null) {
 727→            if (currentCard != null) {
 728→                when (currentCard!!.userFlag()) {
 729→                    1 -> flagIcon.setIcon(R.drawable.ic_flag_red)
 730→                    2 -> flagIcon.setIcon(R.drawable.ic_flag_orange)
 731→                    3 -> flagIcon.setIcon(R.drawable.ic_flag_green)
 732→                    4 -> flagIcon.setIcon(R.drawable.ic_flag_blue)
 733→                    5 -> flagIcon.setIcon(R.drawable.ic_flag_pink)
 734→                    6 -> flagIcon.setIcon(R.drawable.ic_flag_turquoise)
 735→                    7 -> flagIcon.setIcon(R.drawable.ic_flag_purple)
 736→                    else -> flagIcon.setIcon(R.drawable.ic_flag_transparent)
 737→                }
 738→            }
 739→            flagIcon.iconAlpha = alpha
 740→        }
 741→
 742→        // Undo button
 743→        @DrawableRes val undoIconId: Int
 744→        val undoEnabled: Boolean
 745→        val whiteboardIsShownAndHasStrokes = mShowWhiteboard && whiteboard?.undoEmpty() == false
 746→        if (whiteboardIsShownAndHasStrokes) {
 747→            undoIconId = R.drawable.eraser
 748→            undoEnabled = true
 749→        } else {
 750→            undoIconId = R.drawable.ic_undo_white
 751→            undoEnabled = colIsOpen() && col.undoAvailable()
 752→        }
 753→        val alphaUndo = if (undoEnabled && super.controlBlocked !== ReviewerUi.ControlBlock.SLOW) Themes.ALPHA_ICON_ENABLED_LIGHT else Themes.ALPHA_ICON_DISABLED_LIGHT
 754→        val undoIcon = menu.findItem(R.id.action_undo)
 755→        undoIcon.setIcon(undoIconId)
 756→        undoIcon.setEnabled(undoEnabled).iconAlpha = alphaUndo
 757→        undoIcon.actionView!!.isEnabled = undoEnabled
 758→        if (colIsOpen()) { // Required mostly because there are tests where `col` is null
 759→            if (whiteboardIsShownAndHasStrokes) {
 760→                undoIcon.title = resources.getString(R.string.undo_action_whiteboard_last_stroke)
 761→            } else if (col.undoAvailable()) {
 762→                undoIcon.title = resources.getString(R.string.studyoptions_congrats_undo, col.undoName(resources))
 763→                //  e.g. Undo Bury, Undo Change Deck, Undo Update Note
 764→            } else {
 765→                // In this case, there is no object word for the verb, "Undo",
 766→                // so in some languages such as Japanese, which have pre/post-positional particle with the object,
 767→                // we need to use the string for just "Undo" instead of the string for "Undo %s".
 768→                undoIcon.title = resources.getString(R.string.undo)
 769→            }
 770→        }
 771→        if (undoEnabled) {
 772→            mOnboarding.onUndoButtonEnabled()
 773→        }
 774→        val toggleWhiteboardIcon = menu.findItem(R.id.action_toggle_whiteboard)
 775→        val toggleStylusIcon = menu.findItem(R.id.action_toggle_stylus)
 776→        val hideWhiteboardIcon = menu.findItem(R.id.action_hide_whiteboard)
 777→        val changePenColorIcon = menu.findItem(R.id.action_change_whiteboard_pen_color)
 778→        // White board button
 779→        if (prefWhiteboard) {
 780→            // Configure the whiteboard related items in the action bar
 781→            toggleWhiteboardIcon.setTitle(R.string.disable_whiteboard)
 782→            // Always allow "Disable Whiteboard", even if "Enable Whiteboard" is disabled
 783→            toggleWhiteboardIcon.isVisible = true
 784→            if (!mActionButtons.status.toggleStylusIsDisabled()) {
 785→                toggleStylusIcon.isVisible = true
 786→            }
 787→            if (!mActionButtons.status.hideWhiteboardIsDisabled()) {
 788→                hideWhiteboardIcon.isVisible = true
 789→            }
 790→            if (!mActionButtons.status.clearWhiteboardIsDisabled()) {
 791→                menu.findItem(R.id.action_clear_whiteboard).isVisible = true
 792→            }
 793→            if (!mActionButtons.status.saveWhiteboardIsDisabled()) {
 794→                menu.findItem(R.id.action_save_whiteboard).isVisible = true
 795→            }
 796→            if (!mActionButtons.status.whiteboardPenColorIsDisabled()) {
 797→                changePenColorIcon.isVisible = true
 798→            }
 799→            val whiteboardIcon = ContextCompat.getDrawable(this, R.drawable.ic_gesture_white)!!.mutate()
 800→            val stylusIcon = ContextCompat.getDrawable(this, R.drawable.ic_gesture_stylus)!!.mutate()
 801→            val whiteboardColorPaletteIcon = VectorDrawableCompat.create(resources, R.drawable.ic_color_lens_white_24dp, null)!!.mutate()
 802→            if (mShowWhiteboard) {
 803→                whiteboardIcon.alpha = Themes.ALPHA_ICON_ENABLED_LIGHT
 804→                hideWhiteboardIcon.icon = whiteboardIcon
 805→                hideWhiteboardIcon.setTitle(R.string.hide_whiteboard)
 806→                whiteboardColorPaletteIcon.alpha = Themes.ALPHA_ICON_ENABLED_LIGHT
 807→                changePenColorIcon.icon = whiteboardColorPaletteIcon
 808→                if (toggleStylus) {
 809→                    toggleStylusIcon.setTitle(R.string.disable_stylus)
 810→                    stylusIcon.alpha = Themes.ALPHA_ICON_ENABLED_LIGHT
 811→                } else {
 812→                    toggleStylusIcon.setTitle(R.string.enable_stylus)
 813→                    stylusIcon.alpha = Themes.ALPHA_ICON_DISABLED_LIGHT
 814→                }
 815→                toggleStylusIcon.icon = stylusIcon
 816→            } else {
 817→                whiteboardIcon.alpha = Themes.ALPHA_ICON_DISABLED_LIGHT
 818→                hideWhiteboardIcon.icon = whiteboardIcon
 819→                hideWhiteboardIcon.setTitle(R.string.show_whiteboard)
 820→                whiteboardColorPaletteIcon.alpha = Themes.ALPHA_ICON_DISABLED_LIGHT
 821→                stylusIcon.alpha = Themes.ALPHA_ICON_DISABLED_LIGHT
 822→                toggleStylusIcon.isEnabled = false
 823→                toggleStylusIcon.icon = stylusIcon
 824→                changePenColorIcon.isEnabled = false
 825→                changePenColorIcon.icon = whiteboardColorPaletteIcon
 826→                mColorPalette.visibility = View.GONE
 827→            }
 828→        } else {
 829→            toggleWhiteboardIcon.setTitle(R.string.enable_whiteboard)
 830→        }
 831→        if (colIsOpen() && col.decks.isDyn(parentDid)) {
 832→            menu.findItem(R.id.action_open_deck_options).isVisible = false
 833→        }
 834→        if (mTTS.enabled && !mActionButtons.status.selectTtsIsDisabled()) {
 835→            menu.findItem(R.id.action_select_tts).isVisible = true
 836→        }
 837→        // Setup bury / suspend providers
 838→        val suspendIcon = menu.findItem(R.id.action_suspend)
 839→        val buryIcon = menu.findItem(R.id.action_bury)
 840→        setupSubMenu(menu, R.id.action_suspend, SuspendProvider(this))
 841→        setupSubMenu(menu, R.id.action_bury, BuryProvider(this))
 842→        if (suspendNoteAvailable()) {
 843→            suspendIcon.setIcon(R.drawable.ic_action_suspend_dropdown)
 844→            suspendIcon.setTitle(R.string.menu_suspend)
 845→        } else {
 846→            suspendIcon.setIcon(R.drawable.ic_pause_circle_outline)
 847→            suspendIcon.setTitle(R.string.menu_suspend_card)
 848→        }
 849→        if (buryNoteAvailable()) {
 850→            buryIcon.setIcon(R.drawable.ic_flip_to_back_dropdown)
 851→            buryIcon.setTitle(R.string.menu_bury)
 852→        } else {
 853→            buryIcon.setIcon(R.drawable.ic_flip_to_back_white)
 854→            buryIcon.setTitle(R.string.menu_bury_card)
 855→        }
 856→        alpha = if (super.controlBlocked !== ReviewerUi.ControlBlock.SLOW) Themes.ALPHA_ICON_ENABLED_LIGHT else Themes.ALPHA_ICON_DISABLED_LIGHT
 857→        buryIcon.iconAlpha = alpha
 858→        suspendIcon.iconAlpha = alpha
 859→        setupSubMenu(menu, R.id.action_schedule, ScheduleProvider(this))
 860→        mOnboarding.onCreate()
 861→
 862→        increaseHorizontalPaddingOfOverflowMenuIcons(menu)
 863→        tintOverflowMenuIcons(menu, skipIf = { isFlagResource(it.itemId) })
 864→
 865→        return super.onCreateOptionsMenu(menu)
 866→    }

 868→    @SuppressLint("RestrictedApi")
 869→    private fun displayIcons(menu: Menu) {
 870→        try {
 871→            if (menu is MenuBuilder) {
 872→                menu.setOptionalIconsVisible(true)
 873→            }
 874→        } catch (e: Exception) {
 875→            Timber.w(e, "Failed to display icons in Over flow menu")
 876→        } catch (e: Error) {
 877→            Timber.w(e, "Failed to display icons in Over flow menu")
 878→        }
 879→    }

 881→    private fun isFlagResource(itemId: Int): Boolean {
 882→        return itemId == R.id.action_flag_seven || itemId == R.id.action_flag_six || itemId == R.id.action_flag_five || itemId == R.id.action_flag_four || itemId == R.id.action_flag_three || itemId == R.id.action_flag_two || itemId == R.id.action_flag_one
 883→    }

 885→    override fun onKeyDown(keyCode: Int, event: KeyEvent): Boolean {
 886→        if (answerFieldIsFocused()) {
 887→            return super.onKeyDown(keyCode, event)
 888→        }
 889→        if (mProcessor.onKeyDown(keyCode, event) || super.onKeyDown(keyCode, event)) {
